## Summary

Describe the user-visible result and the reason for the change.

## Verification

- [ ] Type checking, dead-code audit, tests, lint, formatting, and production build pass.
- [ ] Changed behavior has focused regression coverage.
- [ ] Browser-facing changes were exercised in Edge or are explicitly identified as unverified.
- [ ] Relevant user, architecture, privacy, limitation, and changelog documentation is updated.
- [ ] Non-obvious lifecycle, ordering, security, heuristic, and retention invariants are commented.
- [ ] Comments explain why the invariant exists and do not merely restate the code.
- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots contain synthetic data only.

## Privacy and permissions

State whether the change affects captured data, retention, browser permissions, exports, or page
behavior. Write `No change` when none apply.
